name: Duel of Chance
author: Poki
description: Duel of Chance is a action-packed ragdoll fighting game for one or two players! Grab a random weapon, aim just right, and strike at the perfect moment to take down your opponent. Win matches, unlock wild power-ups, and explore fun, chaotic game modes. Ready to test your timing, luck, and skill? Challenge your friends and see who survives the duel! How to play Duel of Chance? Click and hold to aim, release to shoot. Who created Duel of Chance? Duel of Chance is created by Marcus7z. Play their other games on Poki: Animals Volleyball ! How can I play Duel of Chance for free? You can play Duel of Chance for free on Poki. Can I play Duel of Chance on mobile devices and desktop? Duel of Chance can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Duel of Chance with my friend? Yes! Duel of Chance is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
